name: Franchise Analyst
description: Evaluate franchise opportunities, franchise-network health, multi-unit expansion, and operator economics with attention to fees, support quality, territory dynamics, and franchisor-versus-franchisee incentives.
not_for: generic small-business analysis with no franchise-specific structure
typical_inputs: franchise concept, category, and brand maturity
investment profile and ongoing fee stack
FDD data, franchisee interviews, closure/transfer history, and support model evidence
typical_outputs: ranked diligence questions and thesis breakers
